name: Chicken Smothered with Black-Eyed Peas
recipeIngredient: 1 4 Pound Roasting Hen, cut into 8 -10 pieces
recipeInstructions:
FOR THE SEASONING MIX:
Mix all ingredients thoroughly in a small bowl. Set aside.
FOR THE CHICKEN:
Sprinkle about 1 tablespoon of the mix on the chicken pieces. Combine the remaining mix with the flour. In a large skillet, heat 1/2 inch oil over high heat. Dredge chicken pieces in seasoned flour and fry until golden brown, about 5 minutes per side. Drain on paper towels.
FOR THE BLACK-EYED PEAS:
In a large Dutch oven, cook bacon until it starts to get crisp. Stir in onion, celery, bell pepper, bay leaves, and 1 teaspoon Tabasco sauce. Cook vegetables until they start to become tender. Add peas, garlic powder, sage, onion powder, thyme, stirring well. Cook until all the oil and juice is absorbed. Add stock or water, chicken pieces, and 1 tablespoon Tabasco sauce. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and let simmer until chicken and peas are tender, about 2 hours. Adjust salt to taste at the end of cooking. Serve over hot cooked rice.
